text: A friend of mine actually recommended that I check out Rainbow River.
I hear that it's beautiful.
The water is just crystal clear.
It just looks so refreshing.
I'm ready to just jump in already.
Let's go.
The Rainbow River is a little piece of heaven right here in Florida.
The water is so crystal clear.
You can see the fish just swimming beneath your tube or your canoe or your kayak.
Come in the fall whenever it's starting to cool down a bit, and then you pretty much
have the whole river all to yourself and you really get a chance to enjoy the birds and
the gators and all of the other wildlife that you'll see.
The Rainbow is more than special to me.
I remember as a child being in love with the springs and just gazing into that crystal
clear water.
It begs you to jump in.
Rainbow River really is an affordable way to spend an afternoon with friends and family.
I mean, if you're a little more adventurous, you could jump in.
Jump off the dock.
There's a rope swing.
You can get out and swim a little bit.
It's a great way to spend a day in Florida.
